summary: On March 10, 2026, Russian operators of the "Rubicon" Center conducted combat operations across multiple directions, destroying 162 targets including Ukrainian personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and UAV control centers. In Dobropole, a Ukrainian Armed Forces MaxxPro armored vehicle was destroyed by a Russian fiber-optic FPV drone "Barmaley." Ukrainian forces are increasing their use of Lightning and strike/reconnaissance drones, though Russian electronic warfare struggles to counter them due to unknown control frequencies. Meanwhile, Russian BM-35 and BM-70 drone attacks on Sumy and other cities have significantly decreased, likely due to production issues, enhanced Ukrainian electronic warfare and interceptor drones, and the disconnection of Starlink systems previously used for control.
